sections.paragraph:
- Original: αὐτοῦ

- Transliteration: Autou

- Phonetic: ow-too'

- Definition:

1. in that place, there, here

- Origin: genitive (i.e. possessive) of G846, used as an adverb of location

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Genitive (that is possessive) of G846 used as an adverb of location; properly belonging to the same spot that is in this (or that) place: - (t-) here.
